free_text: Sequential fission and the influence of 208Pb closed
shells on the dynamics of superheavy element
energies 0.98 to 1.15 of the capture barrier
energies. Targets made of 30 - 160 ug/cm2 of the
actinide material, supported on 115 - 280 ug/cm2 Al
CUBE detector for detection of reaction product
The detector gave continuous scattering angle coverage
of 10 - 80 degree on one side of beam axis, and
55 - 169 degree on the other, with 70 degree azimuthal
No information on source of uncertainties
Data received from D.Y.Jeung by email
